candidate_findings.finding_label: Unnarrated transition from boat to city
candidate_findings.claim: The narrative does not describe the journey from the landing point of the boat to entering the city, potentially creating a gap in continuity.

evidence_spans.span_text: The boat put in before the light failed.
The city received them without ceremony.

candidate_findings.uncertainty_note: The transition may be intentional and quick, fitting the narrative style or context beyond these scenes.
candidate_findings.review_note: Examine whether the rapid transition is justified by prior narrative pace or character behavior.

overall_run_note: One candidate finding of a transition gap identified. No explicit continuity errors detected within the provided text.
